ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
var search_key = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
var search_page = java.get("page");
if (source.getVariable()!=""&&source.getVariable()!=undefined) {
     var Variable = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
     var api = Variable.sourceAPI;
} else {
	    var Variable = "";
}
var search_api = api || source.getKey();
var search_url = search_api + "/search?keyword=" + search_key + "&page=" + search_page;
var result = java.ajax(search_url);
if (result !== "" && result !== null) {
    java.toast("搜索成功！");
    try {
        var data = JSON.parse(result);
        var name = data.data[0].novelName;

        if (java.get("key") == name) {
            java.toast("书籍匹配成功！");
        } else {
            java.toast("抱歉，没有找到您想要的书籍！");
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.toast("解析结果时出错: " + error.message);
    }
} else {
    java.toast("抱歉，搜索失败！");
}
result
</js>

<js>
var search_key = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
var search_page = java.get("page");
if (source.getVariable()!=""&&source.getVariable()!=undefined) {
     var Variable = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
     var api = Variable.sourceAPI;
} else {
	    var Variable = "";
}
var search_api = api || source.getKey();
var search_url = search_api + "/search?keyword=" + search_key + "&page=" + search_page;
var result = java.ajax(search_url);
if (result !== "" && result !== null) {
    java.toast("搜索成功！");
    try {
        var data = JSON.parse(result);
        var name = data.data[0].novelName;

        if (java.get("key") == name) {
            java.toast("书籍匹配成功！");
        } else {
            java.toast("抱歉，没有找到您想要的书籍！");
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.toast("解析结果时出错: " + error.message);
    }
} else {
    java.toast("抱歉，搜索失败！");
}
result
</js>

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
let list = [];
let p = java.getString(".page-link@text").match(/\d\/(\d+)/);
//java.log(p[1]);
for(let i = 1; i <= (p && p[1]? p[1] : 0); i++){  
  let uri = baseUrl;
  let href = uri + `index_${i}.html`;
  //java.log(href);
  list.push(href);
}
list
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var arr = baseUrl.split('/');
var songtype = arr[3];
var songid = arr[4].split('.')[0];
/*
var data = java.ajax("http://service.5sing.kugou.com/song/getSongUrl?version=6.6.70&songid=" + songid + "&songtype=" + songtype);
data = JSON.parse(data).data
data.squrl || data.hqurl || data.lqurl;
*/
	
let params = {
  appid: 3146,
  clienttime: Math.ceil(Date.now() / 1000),
  clientver: 610850,
  dfid: "-",
  from: "com.sing.client.player",
  mid: 114514,
  songfields: "ID,SN,SK,SW,SS,ST,SI,CT,M,S,ZQ,WO,ZC,HY,YG,CK,D,RQ,DD,E,R,RC,SG,C,CS,LV,LG,SY,UID,PT,SCSR,SC,KM5",
  songid: songid,
  songtype: songtype,
  token: "",
  userfields: "ID,NN,I,YCRQ,FCRQ",
  uuid: "-"
}

let signstr = ""
let keys = Object.keys(params).sort()
for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
  signstr += `${keys[i]}=${params[keys[i]]}`
}
let signature = java.md5Encode("UqgPMZpjgRZQ7s8JAuUIP5DQdo5O5NB" + signstr + "UqgPMZpjgRZQ7s8JAuUIP5DQdo5O5NB")

let querys = []
for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
  querys.push(`${keys[i]}=${params[keys[i]]}`.replace(/\,/g, "%2c"))
}
let querystr = querys.join("&") + "&signature=" + signature
let request = java.ajax("https://5sapi.kugou.com/song/getSongUrl?" + querystr)
// java.log(request)
let data = JSON.parse(request).data
data.squrl || data.squrl_backup || data.hqurl || data.hqurl_backup || data.lqurl || data.lqurl_backup
</js>

ruleToc.chapterName:
text
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

header: {"app-version":"4.1.4"}
loginUrl:
<js>
let uu = "https://tmp.xxltest.mengjunnet.com";

 function getCode(){
 	 let app_signature_md5 = "f73576612783f8ed8b68cdf73a56be94";
  	let phone = result.get("账号");
  	let time = String(Date.now());	
  	
   let hashvalue = String(java.md5Encode(encode(phone+time)));	
   let option = {
   "app_signature_md5":app_signature_md5,
   "app_version":"4.1.4",
   "channel":"6",
   "verify_type":"5", 
    "hashvalue":hashvalue,
   "username":phone,
   "timestamp":time
   	}
   header = {
   
   		"user-agent":"Android"
   		
   	}
   let body = "secret_content="+encodeURIComponent(encode(JSON.stringify(option)));
   java.log(body)
   let url = uu+ "/signup/send_verify_code";
   try{
 let resposebody = java.post(url,String(body),{"app-version":"4.1.4","user-agent":"Android"}).body();
 
 	let tip = JSON.parse(decode(resposebody)).tip;
 	
 	java.toast(tip)
 	}catch(e){
 		java.log(e)
 		}
 	
 	}
 
 
 	
 function login(){
 	try{
 	let login_name=source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号")
let code=source.getLoginInfoMap().get("验证码");
    let jsonStr = {
    	"app_signature_md5":"f73576612783f8ed8b68cdf73a56be94",
    	"app_version":"4.1.4",
    	"channel":"default",
    	"uuid":"android",
    	"ver_code":code,
    	"username":login_name
    	}
    
    
    let body = "secret_content=" + encode(JSON.stringify(jsonStr));
    let option = {
        "method": "POST",
        "body": String(body)
    };
    
    let url = uu+"/signup/verify_login," + JSON.stringify(option);
    
   let respbody = decode(java.ajax(url));

<js>
match=result.match(/d\(".+"[^"]+".+"\)/)
function d(a, b){
	b = java.md5Encode(b)
	iv = b.substring(0, 16)
	key = b.substring(16)
	Cipher=java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS7Padding" ,key,iv)
	return Cipher.decryptStr(a)}
eval(match[0])
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
let name = java.getString("h2@text");
let author = java.getString(".MuiStack-root.0@a@text");
let kind = java.getStringList(".MuiStack-root.3@span!0@text").toArray();
let wordCount = java.getString(".MuiStack-root.1@span.1@text");
let lastChapter = java.getString(".MuiStack-root.4@a@text");
let lastChapterTime = java.getString(".MuiStack-root.3@span.0@text");
let coverUrl = java.getString(".MuiGrid-root.MuiGrid-item img@data-src");
let tocUrl = java.getString(".MuiGrid-item.0@a.0@href");

let tags = java.getStringList(".MuiStack-root.-3@a@text");
let description = java.getString(".MuiStack-root.-1@html");
let intro = `　更新日期🕐︎：${lastChapterTime}
　标签🏷︎：${Array(tags).join(",")}
　简介📄：${description}`;

if (kind.find(item => item == "VIP")) {
 let userChapNum = java.getString(".MuiStack-root.-4@span@text");
 let userChap = getUserchap1(java.getString(".MuiStack-root.-4@svg!0@data-testid")).split(" ");
 kind = kind.concat(userChap);
 intro = `　已解锁：${+userChapNum || 0}章
 ${intro}`;
}
result = {
 name: name,
 author: author,
 kind: kind,
 wordCount: wordCount,
 lastChapter: lastChapter,
 intro: intro,
 coverUrl: coverUrl,
 tocUrl: tocUrl
};
if (name.match("什么都没有了呢,5秒后返航")) {
 result = {}
}
JSON.stringify(result);
</js>

   book: _book.req.data.book_info,
   userchap: [_book.book]
  };
 }
 // java.log(`\n\n${index}  ==  ${JSON.stringify(_book)}\n\n`);
 arr.push(_book);
});
/*
result.map((item, index) => {
 java.log(`\n\n${index}  ==  ${JSON.stringify(item)}\n\n`);
})
*/
JSON.stringify(result);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: [property$=author]@content
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_title]@content}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

//净化知乎中同人多段对话引号问题

var eKey= result.match(hashRegx)[0].replace(/\s+/g, '').replace('hash=',"").replace(/'/g,"").replace(/"/g,"").replace(/;/g,"").replace(/\s+/g, '')

var id=((result.match(/var article_id+( = |=)+("(.+)"|'(.+)')/)||[])[2]||'').replace(/"|'/g,'')

var cid=((result.match(/var chapter_id+( = |=)+("(.+)"|'(.+)')/)||[])[2]||'').replace(/"|'/g,'')

java.log(`id=${id}&eKey=${eKey}&cid=${cid}&basecid=${cid}`)

var data = java.post('https://www.shengxuread.co/home/index/ajaxchapter',`id=${id}&eKey=${eKey}&cid=${cid}&basecid=${cid}`,{}).body()
java.setContent(data)
result= JSON.parse(data).info.content
</js>

ruleSearch.author: $.author
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
function loading(){
var su=source.getKey(),
sk=java.get("sk"),
q="?q="+java.encodeURI(sk);

var c="Hm_lvt_="+~~(Date.now()/1e3);
var head={
	accept: "application/json",
	"accept-language": "zh-CN,en-US;q=0.9",
	referer: baseUrl,
	cookie: String(c)
};

var hm=";hm="+java.head(su+"/user/hm.html"+q,head).cookies().hm;
head.cookie = String(head.cookie+hm);

var get=java.get(su+"/user/search.html"+q, head).body();

var j=JSON.parse(get),
m=j.map(_=>JSON.stringify(_));

var b=[],
v=source.getVariable();
//条件判断，存在不为空和0，且小于长度
if(v&&v!=""&&v!=0&&v<m.length){
	for(i=0;i<=v-1;i++){
		b.push(m[i])
		}
	m=b;
	}else{m=m}
//返回列表
return m
}
//当前url包含json为发现，直接返回结果
m=/json/.test(baseUrl)?result:loading();
//不包含json为搜索，进行搜索加载
m
</js>
$.*

b=java.webView("<html></html>","",`atob("${b}")`);let bArr=[];for(let i=0,il=b.length();i<il;i++){bArr[i] = b.charCodeAt(i);}let s10=bArr.length/2,sb2 =[],i11,b10,b11;for(let i10=0;i10<s10;i10++){i11=i10*2;b10=bArr[i11];b11=bArr[i11+1];if(b10===-1&&b11===-2){sb2.push(' ');}else if(b10===13&&b11===0){sb2.push(' ');}else{sb2.push(String.fromCharCode(((b11<<8)&0xff00)|(b10&0xff)));}}return sb2.join('');}
tdv(java.getElement('$.content')).replace(/　　/g,'');
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
  wordCount: o('.count ul li:eq(1) span'),
	latest: o('#newlist a:eq(0)').replace(/\s\-.*|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g,''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('#bookintro').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: J.select('.motion2 a:eq(0)').attr('href'),
};
book;
</js>

sc=java.getString("script.-2:-1@html");

java.ajax(base+url)
</js>html

function parse(data){
	let args=data.split(separator);
	let title = args[0],url=args[1],num=nums;
	
	//链接生成
	 let u=/^\d+/.test(url)?"":url;
 try {num = args[2] }catch(e){}
 try {tag = args[3];
 u=tag=="a"?'/misc.php?mod=ranklist&type=thread&view='+url+'&orderby=all':u;
 u=tag=="t"?'/misc.php?mod=ranklist&type=thread&view='+url+'&orderby=today':u;
  u=tag=="w"?'/misc.php?mod=ranklist&type=thread&view='+url+'&orderby=thisweek':u;
  u=tag=="m"?'/misc.php?mod=ranklist&type=thread&view='+url+'&orderby=thismonth':u;
 
 
 }catch(e){}
	return [title, u, num]
	}

function FlexBox(title, url, num){
		 let obj={};
		 obj.style={},obj.title=title,obj.url=url?url:'',obj.style['layout_flexGrow']=1;
	//数值设定
	let data={1:1,2:0.4,3:0.25,4:0.2,5:0.15,7:0.1,10:0.05};
obj.style['layout_flexBasisPercent']=data[num]
		return obj
		}
result=JSON.stringify(all.map(data=>{
	let args=parse(data);
	return FlexBox.apply(null, args)
	}))

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()

UNE=userInfo['账号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url = "https://www.myrics.com/complete/email/";
body="email="+java.encodeURI(UNE)+"&password="+java.encodeURI(PWD);

c=java.post(url,body,{"referer":"https://www.myrics.com/login"});
x = c.cookies().csrftoken;
java.log(x)
c=String(c.cookies()).replace(/\{|\}/g,'').replace(/,/g,';')
Cookie={
	"cookie":String(c),
	"x-csrftoken":String(x)
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()

UNE=userInfo['账号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url = "https://www.myrics.com/complete/email/";
body="email="+java.encodeURI(UNE)+"&password="+java.encodeURI(PWD);

c=java.post(url,body,{"referer":"https://www.myrics.com/login"});
x = c.cookies().csrftoken;
java.log(x)
c=String(c.cookies()).replace(/\{|\}/g,'').replace(/,/g,';')
Cookie={
	"cookie":String(c),
	"x-csrftoken":String(x)
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()

UNE=userInfo['账号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url = "https://www.myrics.com/complete/email/";
body="email="+java.encodeURI(UNE)+"&password="+java.encodeURI(PWD);

c=java.post(url,body,{"referer":"https://www.myrics.com/login"});
x = c.cookies().csrftoken;
java.log(x)
c=String(c.cookies()).replace(/\{|\}/g,'').replace(/,/g,';')
Cookie={
	"cookie":String(c),
	"x-csrftoken":String(x)
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}
</js>
